title: cook up!
description: adds more options to cook items in a campfire and furnaces and makes all mushrooms edible!
body:
> **please leave any feedback, including bug reports and suggestions, on the [issues page](https://github.com/gamemode-3/cook-up-1.21.5/issues)!**
--- introduces more food options, including more options to cook items in a campfire and furnaces
# FEATURES ## mushrooms #### shrooooms mushrooms can be eaten! red ones poison you if consumed raw. brown ones don't. both restore half a hunger bit with no health boost. #### bbq! you can roast them in a campfire or a furnace. the cooked ones are both fine and restore one bit of hunger with a very low health boost. ## fungi #### nice view from up here eating warped fungi will give you a split second of jump boost. it will also make you dizzy tho... #### hot tub stream? crimson fungi give you fire resistance, but as soon as you stop eating it's all over! on top of that, you get slower, making them a viable but painful way to get out of lava. #### make it last forever
